commit_message: AI-HANDOFF: BANKNAMELEDGER ready for ChatGPT review
commands_run: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|chrome|msedge|powershell|pwsh' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'bead-onboarding-form-validation|playwright|bootstrap|interactive|npm|tsx|run-interactive-watchdog' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap
Search explicit reconsideration concepts in latest-validation-scorecard.json, latest-mapping-calibration.json, and latest-validation-findings.json

tests_run.details: Regenerated mapping calibration, scorecard, and findings with unchanged coverage 7/277 (3%), grade D; product findings 0, ambiguous findings 4, mapping-blocked 0, ready-for-rerun 0.
Reconfirmed 6 trusted executed bank_name observations, 2 passed, 4 manual-review, 0 skipped, and the unchanged recommendation to tighten the Physical Operating Address post-toggle capture.

bank_name.control: page-1 DocuSign Text visible/editable merchant input at ordinal 62
bank_name.separation: The trusted bank_name evidence stayed off routing number, account number, bank_account_type, deposit method, bank-address, phone, email, date, numeric, upload, signature, acknowledgement, and finalization controls.

next_move.reason: The latest findings still say the post-toggle Physical Operating Address capture does not isolate field-local labels, and resolving that blocker can unlock four business_mailing concepts with better coverage return than the remaining singleton options.

key_outcome: This BANKNAMELEDGER rerun made one narrow ledger clarification, revalidated the same non-live bank_name accounting state, and reaffirmed Physical Operating Address resolver work as the single best next move.
blockers: Physical Operating Address post-toggle capture still does not isolate field-local labels for business_mailing_*.
registered_state remains blocked by live target availability despite offline trust.
stakeholder_first_name and stakeholder_last_name still need field-local proof before guarded mutation.
amount fields still lack separate editable-control proof in this saved flow.
uncertainty: document_type remains a credible follow-up singleton after the address capture resolver, but the refreshed scorecard still treats it conservatively as Needs Mapping.
The latest scorecard and findings remain latest-run scoped and should not be treated as cumulative coverage snapshots.
next_recommendation: Run PHYSICALOPERATINGADDRESSRESOLVER as a strictly non-live capture-isolation workstream for business_mailing_address_line_1, business_mailing_city, business_mailing_state, and business_mailing_postal_code.
